name: Teleporter: World of Gamers (Alpha)
short_description: Teleporter is the World of Gamers in VR that unites us in one place to play, watch, and hang out together and find like-minded others in 3D fantastic environments.
detailed_description:
JOIN THE DISCORD CHANNEL!

Join the community, meet amazing folks, and stay updated all the time.
Here is the Discord link for you:


JOIN THE REDDIT CHANNEL

Join the Teleporter Reddit community to share your in-game experiences, Teleporter memes, your best moments, and to stay connected with other players!


Your Gamer ID

Hey folks!

Don't forget to create your Teleporter Gamer ID by following the link below:


Your Gamer ID will help you to express yourself to the others, and show what kind of games you like to play.
You can also see other players' IDs by grabbing their avatar dolls in your inventory, and see what other players like to do.

This way, you can find like-minded folks easier and start having fun together!


Feedback Board is Available!

Hi all!

We have released the product feedback board on
We are eager to hear the improvement needs, bug reports, new ideas, and feature requests.

Let's build together!


AVAILABLE AT 9.30 CET TONIGHT!

Hi all! Teleporter: WoG will be ready to download tonight (May 17) at 9.00 CET. Can't wait to see you there!


About the Game

Teleporter is the World of Gamers in VR that unites us in one place to play, watch, and hang out together.
You can find like-minded geek and gamer folks and communities here;

- Play console & board games together,
- Compete with other players on arcade games,
- Share your screen to watch videos or play your own games with others,
- Have your own super-duper space caravan and make it your fantastic flying home,
- Hang out in wonderful social spaces such as medieval taverns and heroic forests,
- Enjoy epic gaming events, geek movie nights, esports tournaments, fireside gatherings, carnivals, and much more!

This is the first baby step of building the future of social for gamers.
We believe our community to empower, engage, build, and feed a world for all the ways gamers get together, an ultimate place that belongs to us all.
Feels good? :) Join us on Discord and Reddit to be a part of this amazing community of gamers!

P.S. This place was built by gamers & geeks for all the video game lovers in the world.
